message:
test(fcp-raptorq): add JSONL structured logging for preset selection tests

Added LogCapture integration to RaptorQ config tests for observability:

Cargo.toml:
- Added chrono and fcp-testkit dev-dependencies for test logging

config.rs:
- log_selection() helper emits structured JSONL test entries with:
  - timestamp, test_name, module, phase, correlation_id
  - result/duration/assertions/context metadata
- preset_selection_logs_and_validates_jsonl: logs Lan vs Derp profile
  selection with datagram bytes, symbols per frame, repair ratio
- from_preset_clamps_to_mtu_bounds_and_logs: validates MTU clamping
  and logs requested vs selected symbol sizes
- bound_symbol_size_respects_override_and_logs: validates explicit
  symbol size is respected and logs bounding decisions

Minor formatting fix: removed unnecessary line break in max_payload calc.

All tests call capture.assert_valid() to verify JSONL schema compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
